target: 52. Hiruko Cave
Hizuru Minakata

I can see the iron bars.
It seems to be a dead end ahead.

The shadows came from this direction…
Maybe it's a secret passage just for them.

This confirms it.
The shadows are moving through the underground tunnels
like the sewers.

Hmm… and the underground here
has been dug up so many times by the military…

No one can even tell its full shape anymore…
There could be countless secret passages.

But what do we do?
We don't have any tools to cut through the bars…

Should we go back and find another entrance?
According to the map, it should be near the center of the island.

No… probably there's no entrance.
At least, not one a person could use.

Look here.
This part isn't part of the sewer…
Probably a natural cave that was here originally.
…I can't believe it actually exists… 'Hiruko Cave'…
Eh?
When I was a kid, my grandfather told me stories…

There's a huge hollow space
underneath Hitogashima Island…
That's Hiruko Cave.

Until the mid-Meiji period,
there was an entrance that appeared only during low tide
near Hitogashima Port.

During the Sino-Japanese War…
The military sealed it during port renovations…

This island's legend… I thought it was just a story…
Long ago, it's said that Hiruko-sama,
the island's guardian deity,
arrived here and settled.

The Hiruko legend…
You should know it well, Mio.
Shall we switch?

Stop it!
…Not now…

You could ask Karikiri's descendant…
If his father were alive…
He might know something.

Either way,
we'll need a plasma cutter to get through.
Let's go back first--

…Shh!
Be quiet…
Mio Kofune

Hey! Let's go back already!
There's no way we're staying here…

I must've misseen it!! 
You saw it too, right, Tetsu-san?

Ugh… 
The stench of the sewers is all over me…
You should take a bath before going to Miyako…

Ugh!
I'll tell Erika that you were reliable!

Huh!?
You're serious!?

…I was going to say that, but
it seems this way is a dead end.
There's an iron gate.
Shiori!!

No…!!
Wait, Mio!

How?!
How are we getting past the gate--
Blinding…!?
Oh…!

W-What was that!?
The iron gate just vanished!!
Bad…

Wait!!
Shiori!!
Are we dreaming…?

Huh!?
Go! Mio!
No way…!
Hizuru Minakata
…Hey, what just happened…

Mio Kofune… and Officer Tetsu…
You mistook her for a B-cup…

No!! 
What I mean is,
the shadow made the bars disappear!!

…Maybe it hit the mark.
Her bad feeling…

I wouldn't go.
It's a trap.

But at least Mio is human.
She has immunity.

…Tch!
I don't know if a ghost or a snake will come out.
